title: valeriana alternifolia subsp. stubendorfii
intro: Valeriana alternifolia subsp. stubendorfii, also known as Stubendorf's valerian, is a subspecies of valerian plant that belongs to the Valerianaceae family. It is a perennial plant native to New Zealand, valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a sedative, anti-anxiety, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Valeriana alternifolia subsp. stubendorfii include promoting relaxation, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving sleep quality, making it a popular natural remedy for insomnia and restlessness. Herbal preparations of Stubendorf's valerian include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
